_comment: Global selector -> NormalizedTransactionType fallback map used by the selector fallback stage (DirectMethodIdSupport). These are address-agnostic, cross-protocol standard 4-byte selectors (Uniswap/router swaps, Aave/Compound lend-borrow-repay-withdraw, bridge send, GMX custody, reward claim, ERC-20 approve). Selectors that collide across protocol families must be handled by verified family classifiers, NOT added here. Values must be valid NormalizedTransactionType enum names (validated fail-fast at load).
